nodes.context: A 'Ndrangheta-based organized crime family based in Hamilton, Ontario, Canada, involved in racketeering, drug trafficking, and other crimes.
A Mafia family in Hamilton, Ontario, rivals of the Papalia family, ordered the murder of Johnny Papalia.
One of three centralized Mafia organizations in Hamilton, Ontario.
American Mafia family based in Buffalo, New York, allied with the Papalia family.
Montreal-based Mafia family; Papalia lieutenant borrowed money from them.
Outlaw motorcycle club; a former Papalia associate joined them after Johnny's death.
Mafia family related to the Papalias by marriage, involved in bootlegging and drug trafficking.

edges.context: The Musitanos ordered the murder of Johnny Papalia and his lieutenant, leading to a decline of the Papalia family.
Both are centralized Mafia organizations in Hamilton, but no direct conflict or alliance is mentioned.
Johnny Papalia was a made man in the Buffalo family and had strong connections with them.
Papalia lieutenant borrowed $7.2 million from the Rizzuto family and failed to repay, leading to a murder.
After Johnny's death, associate Gerald Ward left the Papalias to join the Hells Angels.
The Italiano clan was related by marriage and participated in the same criminal activities.
